_legend: Role titles mirror real IITP student-affairs functions (real). All NAMES, photos, emails are DUMMY placeholders. Design is role-keyed + ordered so people change WITHOUT code edits — edit this file only.
heading: Meet the Team

intro.value: The people behind student support at IIT Patna.

members.name: Prof. A. Placeholder
members.blurb: Leads the Student Affairs Office and overall student welfare.

members.name: Prof. B. Placeholder
members.blurb: President, Board for Hostel Management; oversees residential life.

members.blurb: Day-to-day welfare and discipline in the boys' hostels.

members.name: Dr. D. Placeholder
members.blurb: Day-to-day welfare and discipline in the girls' hostel.

members.name: Mr. E. Placeholder
members.blurb: Administrative support for student affairs and hostels.

members.name: Student Placeholder
members.blurb: Elected student head of the Gymkhana council.

_swapGuide: To update people: change name/photo/email/blurb only. To add/remove a role: add/remove an object and renumber 'order'. No component code needs editing.
